key_stakeholders.local_architect: 元宏聯合建築師事務所 (LKP & Partners)
key_stakeholders.developer: 威京總部集團 (Core Pacific Group / BES Engineering)

urban_context.zoning_constraints: Solar envelope slope compliance, legal city center setback boundaries, visual corridor restrictions, greening plot ratio bonus mechanisms
urban_context.project_origin: Inverting a high-density commercial site (former Agora Club) into an ultra-luxury eco-centric biometric vertical forest village landmark

tectonic_systems.structure: Exoskeleton Mega-Frame System coupled with Steel Reinforced Concrete (SRC) structures, large-span Vierendel truss frames, and nuclear-grade EPS spherical sliding base isolation bearings
tectonic_systems.facade: Unitized glass curtain wall system with Low-E multi-layered double glazing doors, wrapped over double-curved cantilevered reinforced concrete planting troughs and thermal break insulation grids
tectonic_systems.environmental_tech: Aerodynamic wind-deflection double-helix sloped massing, passive thermodynamic self-shading overhang plates, smart greywater & groundwater recycling center for high-altitude microclimatic smart irrigation, integrated rooftop BIPV energy systems

stage_2_knowledge_structure.site_context_ontology: Sutures the sharp friction boundary within Taipei's dense mineralized commercial skyline. Releases the ground footprint to establish a landscaped public podium base, incorporating over 23,000 trees to absorb 130+ tons of carbon annually.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.scale_and_geometry_morphology: Deconstructs the vertical standalone skyscraper profile into a dynamic DNA double-helix geometry, rotating precisely 4.5 degrees per floor for a total of 90 degrees to mitigate structural streetwall oppression.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.user_sociology_syntax: Prioritizes ultimate occupant safety and safe sensory territoriality using massive deep-framed 8-meter cantilevered fan-shaped balconies acting as living biological curtains, while integrating a centralized vertical supercar elevator hub straight into the suites.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.lifecycle_events_logistics: Defies extreme structural seismic and wind twisting torques in active earthquake zones by deploying 48 nuclear-grade EPS base isolators coupled with long-term structural health fiber-optic sensor array networks across the lifecycle.
stage_2_knowledge_structure.performance_thermodynamics: The rotating double-helix massing works as an aerodynamic wind-attenuation envelope breaking up typhoon forces, while the protruding structural floor plates establish an efficient passive self-shading thermodynamic engine.

stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.category: 2. 幾何與形式生成 (Geometry & Form Generation)
stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.causal_dialectic: Rejects the generic vertical skyscraper silhouette by implementing an active clock-wise rotation of 4.5 degrees per floor. This parametric double-helix transformation successfully dissolves skyline massing oppression while maximizing continuous daylighting catchment angles.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: High-resolution photographs capture the distinct, fluid twisting path of the white concrete slab edges and structural exoskeleton framing columns stepping through space.

stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.category: 4. 構造、材料與工程實務 (Tectonics, Materials & Construction)
stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.causal_dialectic: Eradicates conventional internal structural columns by transferring all critical vertical and seismic loads to the centralized concrete core and the exterior twisting Vierendel truss framework columns, unlocking an absolute column-free interior flexible flat plan.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The domestic blueprint documents a total absence of internal structural column grids within the core luxury起居 zones; all gravity structures align precisely at the perimeter boundary frames.

stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.category: 5. 空間行為學與公共利益 (Behavioral Realm & Public Benefit)
stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.causal_dialectic: Dismantles hermetically sealed glass environments to revive sub-tropical high-altitude forest living. Embedding flush structural floor tracks erases physical barriers, allowing interior luxury spaces to flow seamlessly onto the expansive 8-meter deep cantilevered terrace decks.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The construction detail captures the perfectly flush track profile interface where the low-E fenestration meets the structural planter plate without vertical water-retaining curbs.

stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.category: 1. 生態與環境應對 (Ecology & Climate Adaptation)
stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.causal_dialectic: Neutralizes high solar heat gains characteristic of sub-tropical tracks. The shifting, extended structural slab boundaries project deep shadows over the glazing layers of lower floors, creating an architectural self-shading geometry that blocks excessive high-angle solar radiation.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The sectional engineering schematic maps out the precise sun-path geometric shading projection cast by the upper overhang plates over the double-glazed facades below.

stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.category: 1. 生態與環境應對 (Ecology & Climate Adaptation)
stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.causal_dialectic: Eliminates dangerous thermal bridge corridors where conductive steel exoskeleton attachment pins and extended concrete planter plates project directly from the interior shells, preventing wall condensation, molding, and rapid heating loss.

graphic_evidence_alignment.description: The structural detail blueprint explicitly charts high-durability thermal separation pads sandwiched tightly between external steel attachment anchors and internal concrete slabs.

stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.category: 6. 數位孿生與智能化運算 (Digital Twin & Smart Building)
stage_3_ontology_mapping_verification.causal_dialectic: Absent by tectonic design choice. The structure targets permanent passive material durability (concrete planters) and static mass self-shading geometries instead of motorized active IoT responsive shutters or dynamic electronic glazing networks.

graphic_evidence_alignment.reason_of_gap: Prioritized absolute material permanence, low-maintenance structural integrity, and robust passive geometric climatic controls over complex high-maintenance electromechanical motorized kinetics, omitting automated cabling telemetry drawings.
